title: Our Shepherd
story:
A young boy once visited a countryside farm where he watched a shepherd guiding his sheep.

He noticed something unusual—the sheep were calm, even when walking through unfamiliar paths. They did not seem afraid or anxious.

Curious, the boy asked the shepherd, “Why don’t the sheep get scared or lost?”

The shepherd gently replied, “Because they know my voice. They trust me to lead them to safe places and provide everything they need.”

Years later, when the boy faced challenges and uncertainty in life, he remembered those words. Instead of being overwhelmed, he chose to trust God just like the sheep trusted their shepherd.

Slowly, peace replaced his fear, and he found strength in knowing he was not alone.

Just like that shepherd, God knows you personally. He sees your struggles, understands your needs, and lovingly leads you toward peace and restoration.
life_lesson:
God knows exactly what you need and when you need it.

When you trust His guidance instead of your own understanding, you will find peace, rest, and direction even in uncertain times.
prayer:
Dear Heavenly Father,

Thank You for being my Shepherd—my guide, protector, and provider.

When I feel anxious, lost, or uncertain, help me to trust in Your voice and follow Your path.

Lead me to places of peace and rest, and restore my soul when I am weary.

Teach me to surrender my worries and rely fully on Your care.

In Jesus' name,
Amen.
reflection_question:
Where in your life do you feel lost or uncertain right now?

Are you trying to control everything, or are you trusting God to guide you?

What is one step you can take today to rest in God’s presence and follow His leading?
verse:
The Lord is my Shepherd, I shall not be in want.
He makes me lie down in green pastures, He leads me beside quiet waters,
He restores my soul.
